hooks.command: echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | python3 -c "import json,sys; p=json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''); exit(1 if '_scripts/' in p else 0)"

cd /Users/ts-1148/Desktop/Pulu-workspace && git add -A && if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then CHANGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only | head -3 | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ $//'); COUNT=$(git diff --cached --name-only | wc -l | tr -d ' '); MSG="auto-sync: ${CHANGED}"; [ "$COUNT" -gt 3 ] && MSG="${MSG} (+$((COUNT-3)) more)"; git commit -m "$MSG" && git push 2>/dev/null || true; fi; rsync -a --delete --exclude='.git/' /Users/ts-1148/Desktop/Pulu-workspace/ "/Users/ts-1148/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-lephuongkhanh1995@gmail.com/My Drive/Pulu-workspace/" 2>/dev/null || true
